text: I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity as I enter this bright, modern space. The glass walls and clean lines hint at both transparency and separation—inviting me in, yet keeping a boundary. As I approach the exhibit, the bold colors and the 'R+D' message awaken my mind to the idea of innovation and inquiry. Here, I am not just an observer; I am drawn in to question the synthesis of technology, creativity, and the human experience. I am both engaged and reflective, ready to explore the relationship between research, development, and my own place within this evolving landscape.
